name: nextjs-spring
description: A starter project with Next.js frontend and Spring Boot backend

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && ./mvnw clean install -DskipTests
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && ./mvnw clean package -DskipTests
scripts.start: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run start" "cd backend && java -jar target/demo-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar"
